reason: The mockup is exceptionally well-structured and aligns perfectly with the visual reference brief. It has clear, high-contrast typography, adheres to Miller's Law with only 5 distinct visual groups, and provides a clear spatial layout for operators. Visual cues for lead states and conversation sentiment are well-integrated.
concerns: The timestamp metadata text uses color class '.text-outline' (#727785) on a light background, resulting in a contrast ratio of ~4.3:1, slightly below the WCAG 2.1 AA threshold of 4.5:1 for small text.
The quick action buttons (Quick Replies, Macros, Contract Template) have a rendered height of ~32px, which is below the 44x44px target recommended by Fitts's Law for mobile touch targets.
The back arrow button in the header is styled with 'p-xs' (4px padding), making its overall interactive touch target slightly smaller than 44x44px on smaller viewports.
